detectors.description:
Worm.sendETHToFee(uint256) (Worm.sol#607-613) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Worm.sol#609)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Worm.sol#611)
detectors.markdown:
[Worm.sendETHToFee(uint256)](Worm.sol#L607-L613) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [_teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](Worm.sol#L609)
	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2))](Worm.sol#L611)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Worm._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Worm.sol#459-587):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Worm.sol#555)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Worm.sol#601)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Worm.sol#561)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Worm.sol#609)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Worm.sol#611)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Worm.sol#583)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Worm.sol#713)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Worm.sol#693)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Worm.sol#695)
	Worm._rOwned (Worm.sol#223) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Worm._takeTeam(uint256) (Worm.sol#707-715)
	- Worm._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Worm.sol#689-703)
	- Worm.balanceOf(address) (Worm.sol#339-343)
	- Worm.constructor(address,address) (Worm.sol#285-303)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Worm.sol#583)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Worm.sol#721)
	Worm._rTotal (Worm.sol#235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Worm._getCurrentSupply() (Worm.sol#787-797)
	- Worm._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Worm.sol#719-725)
	- Worm.constructor(address,address) (Worm.sol#285-303)
	- Worm.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Worm.sol#395-403)

detectors.description:
Worm._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Worm.sol#459-587) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool)(buycooldown[to] < block.timestamp) (Worm.sol#489)
	- require(bool)(sellcooldown[from] < block.timestamp) (Worm.sol#505)
	- firstsell[from] + (86400) < block.timestamp (Worm.sol#507)

	- [require(bool)(sellcooldown[from] < block.timestamp)](Worm.sol#L505)
	- [firstsell[from] + (86400) < block.timestamp](Worm.sol#L507)

detectors.description: Worm._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Worm.sol#459-587) has a high cyclomatic complexity (14).

Version constraint ^0.8.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.4 (Worm.sol#1)
